description: Using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis, consolidate the monthly surveillance data from Surv_Jan.csv, Surv_Feb.csv, and Surv_Mar.csv (located in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Data\) into a master dataset named 'Q1_Confirmed.csv'. The consolidated file must only contain records with a Classification of 'Confirmed'. Produce a frequency report of the 'Disease' variable from this master dataset and save it as 'Q1_Summary.html'.
